applies_when: User asks whether an international logistics route fits without sharing country or goods info
User leaves a vague comment like need international shipping
items.response_goal: Keep the reply warm while turning a vague logistics inquiry into usable shipment facts.
do: Acknowledge the wish to avoid踩坑
Ask for destination, goods type, shipment mode, and biggest concern
Keep the next step answerable in one message
avoid: Recommending a fixed route without facts
items.safe_transition: 如果你告诉我发哪个国家、什么货型、是更偏海运、空运还是双清，以及更担心时效、清关还是赔付，我可以先帮你把路线收窄。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user provides country and goods facts, hand off to Catcher.

applies_when: User says it is the first time shipping internationally
User sounds unsure whether sea, air, or special line fits
items.response_goal: Reduce uncertainty first, then guide the user toward a simple logistics route.
do: Offer a simple way to narrow the route
avoid: Pushing the most complex route first
items.safe_transition: 第一次发国际物流先看适不适合很正常，我们可以先把国家、货型、时效和最卡的环节理清楚。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user confirms route and market, route to Catcher.

applies_when: User asks about pickup, clearance, or delivery speed
User worries delays or customs issues will kill the shipment
items.response_goal: Answer SLA concerns honestly while guiding toward a realistic route.
do: Explain there may be route and cost differences
Offer to narrow to the best option for that shipment
avoid: Saying every route is easy to handle
Guaranteeing ultra-fast delivery for all goods
items.safe_transition: 时效和清关确实会影响发货，我们可以先看你做哪个国家、什么货型、想走海运还是空运，再判断哪条路线更适合。
items.handoff_suggestion: If country and SLA facts are confirmed, hand off to Catcher.

applies_when: User asks about customs, compensation, or restricted goods
User worries damage, loss, or tax disputes will be too hard
items.response_goal: Help the user feel guided through the real exception-handling setup, not just sold a low price.
do: Ask about goods type, claim expectations, and customs needs
items.safe_transition: 如果你告诉我发哪个国家、什么货型、以及更担心查验、仓损还是赔付，我可以先帮你看更稳的方案。
items.handoff_suggestion: If claims concerns are clear, hand off to Catcher.

applies_when: User asks for detailed quote logic or loopholes in public comments
User discusses sensitive customs or compensation details in comments
items.response_goal: Keep public replies useful but move detailed qualification into a safer short follow-up channel.
do: Invite the user to continue with key facts in DM
avoid: Posting a full quote strategy publicly
Collecting risky compliance details in comments
items.safe_transition: 评论区先不把线路和赔付说太满，你把国家、货型和最卡的问题发我，我再帮你细分。
items.handoff_suggestion: Move to DM and then route to Catcher.

applies_when: A returning customer asks about restocking or lane upgrade
User asks what changed this time
items.response_goal: Treat the reply like a repeat-shipment decision, not a fresh first-inquiry pitch.
do: Reference what may have changed this time
Guide toward new lanes or easier replenishment
Keep the tone familiar and light
avoid: Pretending every shipment cycle is identical
items.safe_transition: 如果你是老客回来看，我们先看这次新增了什么、补货周期到了没有，再决定值不值得继续。
items.handoff_suggestion: If repeat intent is clear, hand off to Followup.
